name: Westinghouse Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. Beat the egg yolks separately.
3. Add milk to the egg yolks and mix with the sifted dry ingredients until the batter is smooth.
4. Fold in the melted butter and stiffly beaten egg whites.
5. Preheat the waffle iron.
6. Cook for 3 or 4 minutes, or until done.
This recipe makes 6 waffles.
